title: sphaeroma bonariense
intro: Sphaeroma bonariense, also known as Argentine sphaeroma or Argentine roundwormwood, is a type of flowering plant in the family Verbenaceae, native to South America. The plant has been traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, including its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Sphaeroma bonariense include its ability to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its use as a diuretic. Herbal preparations of Sphaeroma bonariense can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures to utilize its medicinal properties.
